item.title: Wait... Elon lied? And a Cybertruck incel believed him? – Driver intentionally drove Cybertruck into North Texas lake to use vehicle's "Wade Mode", police say
item.description:
"Police said McDaniel is charged with operation of a vehicle in a closed section of the lake, not having a valid boat registration and other water safety equipment violations." – LOL, charged with not having registered his "boat."
You can't park there mate. Also, water isn't supposed to exceed 32" and driver assumes all responsibility for damage by water.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Carl Sagan Predicted Exactly This in 1995. Nobody Listened. He's Been Dead 30 Years and He's Still the Smartest Person in the Fucking Room.
item.description: Carl Sagan warned us 30 years ago: kill scientific literacy, and the next fucking charlatan walks straight through the front door. Guess what? The door's off the goddamn hinges. We didn't just ignore the warning- we elected it. Twice. The systematic dismantling of the EPA, NIH, FDA, and public education isn't incompetence- it's a feature. An ignorant population is a compliant population. That's not conspiracy, that's the oldest shit in the authoritarian playbook. Sagan knew. Jefferson knew. We forgot. "Who runs the science and technology in a democracy if the people don't know anything about it?"- Sagan, 1995. The answer is now: some orange bastard who thinks windmills cause cancer & vaccines cause autism. Congratulations, dipshits. You played yourselves. Science is a method, not an opinion. Defunding it doesn't make reality go away- it just means you face it unprepared. #CarlSagan #ScienceMatters #AntiIntellectualism #TrumpWar0nScience #PostTruth #CriticalThinking #Democracy #WereUpForGrabs
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Trump's cancelled culture failing
item.description: Unfortunately for the Republicans in America, the First Amendment still exists. https://reason.com/2026/05/20/a-tennessee-man-jailed-for-37-days-because-of-an-anti-trump-meme-will-get-835000-for-his-trouble Do not let these people make you afraid. That does not mean you are allowed to threaten violence or anything like that on anybody, but you are allowed to speak your disdain for policies and the people who push them.

item.title: heckin fluff man
item.description:
He’d like to register a complaint
Hahahaha
He exploded
Sometimes being spa assistant is a tough job haha (this guy loves being in here and has trouble setting in his kennel so when he’s here for daycare he hangs out with me for downtime, don’t worry I cleaned him up right after and everyone got lots of treats)

item.title: GovBrief Today #475
item.description: Two January 6 officers sued Donald Trump Wednesday to block his $1.776 billion fund for the rioters. Harry Dunn and Daniel Hodges say the Anti-Weaponization Fund violates the 14th Amendment. Ratified after the Civil War, Section 4 bars the federal government from paying debts "incurred in aid of insurrection." Their complaint calls the fund "the most brazen act of presidential corruption this century." The Treasury that pays Hodges and Dunn for protecting the Capitol can also pay the people who beat them. Vice President Vance confirmed it Tuesday. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell Congress to back the officers who protected the country on January 6 and end the fund before the first check clears. I've emailed 7,498 stories over 475 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260520-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/castro-indictment [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may20 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/preventive-chairs [4] https://go.govbrief.today/ebola-diversion [5] https://go.govbrief.today/nm-hazmat [6] https://go.govbrief.today/polis-censure [7] https://go.govbrief.today/sc-foia [8] https://go.govbrief.today/kirk-settlement [9] https://go.govbrief.today/dessert-report [10] https://go.govbrief.today/pra-judge [11] https://go.govbrief.today/ar-discrimination [12] https://go.govbrief.today/bock-sentencing [13] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-surgery [14] https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-cuba [15] https://go.govbrief.today/vape-donation [16] https://go.govbrief.today/arch-congress [17] https://go.govbrief.today/police-fund Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: This has me cracking up!
item.description: This comment is what made me laugh. It’s funny how she put her credit card info thinking there’s a game when in reality there was no game, and had to call the bank. This same exact thing happened to me years back. I stupidly put my credit info in, said it was incorrect, even after pushing it three times. I had two other cards, I stupidly put them in as well and it said the same thing, they were incorrect. A week later, got a call from the bank saying there was suspicious activity going on, multiple purchases from other states, and how much the purchases were. I had to get all of my cards changed.
item.dc:creator: RainingInternally

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1694 (flamingo booties)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. (Iranian flatbread)
My understanding is Moderna has been working on one too. But yeah, we have these lizards in AZ, too, and i love infodropping this bit on East coasters.
Men will fake vampire attacks instead of going to therapy.
Pippin's approach to life
@graehall
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I love you. Why thank you! What doing?" _____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
